items.title: Bitcoin miner MARA to acquire Long Ridge in $1.5 billion Ohio gas plant deal
items.desc: MARA will acquire an Ohio natural gas plant operator for $1.5 billion, shifting from bitcoin mining to digital infrastructure.

items.title: Spain emerges as leading EURC retail market in Europe, Brighty data shows
items.desc: Brighty data shows Spain leading EURC retail usage, offering an early look at how euro stablecoins are being used under MiCA.

items.title: Bitcoin analysts explain why BTC price can’t take out $80K
items.desc: A large overhead supply cluster, increased profit-taking activity and the resumption of spot Bitcoin ETF outflows are key factors keeping BTC price pinned below $80,000.

items.title: Kast hires former SEC official Stephanie Allen to lead policy communications
items.desc: Stablecoin payments company Kast hired former SEC adviser Stephanie Allen as it expands licensing, communications and policy efforts after an $80 million raise.

items.title: Coinbase's asset manager to offer stablecoin credit fund with tokenized share class
items.desc: The fund, dubbed CUSHY, targets yield from onchain lending and private credit, offering tokenized access through Superstate for institutional investors.

items.title: Solana ecosystem expands institutional push with Europe-focused research arm
items.desc: Solana is launching a Swiss-based research institute and practitioner guide to help European financial institutions evaluate its blockchain as regulatory clarity and onchain usage grow.

items.title: Banks push to slow stablecoin law as Agora races for charter
items.desc: U.S. banks are looking to delay landmark stablecoin legislation even as crypto firms like Agora push ahead.

items.title: South Korea seeks 20-year sentence for Delio CEO over $169M crypto fraud
items.desc: Prosecutors say Jeong Sang-ho’s “active deceptive acts” left nearly 2,800 investors frozen out of their funds, as South Korea's crackdown on the crypto industry widens.

items.title: UK regulator clears path for tokenized funds within existing rules
items.desc: The FCA signs off rules to let UK funds keep registers onchain and add a new Direct‑to‑Fund dealing model, aiming to simplify tokenized funds inside the existing regime.

items.title: Did Bitcoin bottom versus gold? BTC price will reach $167K in 2027 if history repeats
items.desc: Bitcoin’s 40% rebound against gold signals a potential bottom, echoing past setups that preceded strong BTC/USD rallies.

items.title: Bitcoin ‘trapped below’ key resistance level as ETF outflows stretch to three days amid Fed split
items.desc: Analysts focused less on the pause itself and more on the Fed’s unusually deep split amid ongoing bitcoin ETF outflows and weak demand.

items.title: Gemini secures Derivatives Clearing Organization license as it works toward full CFTC stack
items.desc: Gemini's Olympus unit received a key DCO license from the CFTC, enabling it to act as an in-house derivatives clearinghouse.

items.title: North Korea accounts for 76% of 2026 crypto hack losses, with theft since 2017 topping $6 billion: TRM Labs
items.desc: North Korea-linked hackers stole $577 million in two April exploits, accounting for 76% of crypto losses in 2026, according to TRM Labs.

items.title: US gov’t sues four states, RWAs cross $30 billion: Month in Charts
items.desc: The US CFTC has sued four states for trying to enforce state-level gambling laws on prediction markets, meanwhile Strategy stacked over 56,000 BTC.

items.title: The long con: How North Korean spies spent months in-person to drain $285 million from Drift
items.desc: The security intelligence research firm said North Korean-state-backed hackers account for 76% of all crypto scam and hack losses in 2026 and have stolen $6 billion since 2017.

items.title: Maple Finance's SYRUP Token Now Available on Revolut in UK and EU
items.desc: Maple Finance's SYRUP token launched on Revolut, giving the fintech's 70M+ users across 39 countries access to on-chain institutional credit yield.

items.title: THORWallet partners with Unblock to expand global non-custodial Mastercard access
items.desc: THORWallet has partnered with Swiss-regulated provider Unblock to expand global access to non-custodial Mastercard solutions, advancing self-custodial finance adoption.

items.title: Germany’s AllUnity expands EURAU to Solana as euro stablecoins gain traction
items.desc: The firm's MiCA-compliant euro token aims to speed up euro transfers and support regulated onchain finance as the euro stablecoin market doubled since early 2025.

items.title: The Green Beret was just the start: New data suggests military insider trading crisis on Polymarket
items.desc: New data shows unusually high win rates in defense bets, building on research that 3% of traders drive prices and under 1% capture most profits.

items.title: Crypto hack losses top $630M in April, highest since February 2025
items.desc: Losses from crypto hacks have topped $630 million in April across more than 25 hacks, with DeFi dominating major incidents and exploits accelerating despite security updates.

items.title: MegaETH token goes live as major exchanges open MEGA trading
items.desc: MegaETH’s MEGA token went live on April 30, completing a seven-day countdown triggered after the project hit its first KPI with 10 live apps.

items.title: US seized $500M in Iranian crypto assets, Treasury secretary says
items.desc: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US has seized nearly $500 million in Iranian crypto assets, surpassing the previously reported $344 million freeze.

items.title: Seasonal trends favor bulls even as bitcoin ends April in a defensive mood
items.desc: Your day-ahead look for April 30, 2026

items.title: South Korea’s Shinhan Card taps Solana to test real-world stablecoin payments
items.desc: Shinhan Card signed a deal with Solana Foundation to expand stablecoin payment tests and explore non-custodial wallets and DeFi-based services.

items.title: Bitcoin faces $80,000 resistance as derivatives show signs of risk aversion
items.desc: Bitcoin faces profit-taking pressure near $80,000, backed up by a U.S. inflation report that comes as high oil prices and rising bond yields weigh on risk assets.

items.title: Wasabi Protocol hit by more than $5 million exploit across multiple chains, security firms say
items.desc: Blockaid and CertiK said a compromised admin key was used to upgrade Wasabi Protocol contracts and drain funds.

items.title: Australia draft payments vision eyes stablecoin interoperability
items.desc: A draft vision for Australia’s domestic payments system says stablecoins and tokenized fiat currency could reshape how money moves across future rails.

items.title: Wasabi Protocol drained of $4.5 million in apparent admin key compromise
items.desc: The exploit used a playbook similar to Drift's $285 million breach earlier this month: a compromised deployer key with no timelock or multisig that drained funds.

items.title: Ethereum to $60K? It's a 'generational play' for ETH bull Tom Lee, says analyst
items.desc: ETH price is retesting a long-term support trend line that previously preceded a 5,200% rally, a fractal setup pointing to a potential move toward $60,000 by 2030.

items.title: South Korea seeks 20-year term for Delio CEO in $169 million crypto case: report
items.desc: South Korean prosecutors seek 20 years for Delio CEO over $168.8 million embezzlement from 2,800 crypto deposit users.

items.title: Bitcoin eyes $75K after 'most hawkish' FOMC as oil hits highest since 2022
items.desc: Bitcoin price action remained weak as the US-Iran war delivered a Fed meeting that was the "most hawkish in years" and oil neared four-year highs.

items.title: Stablecoin fintech KAST appoints former SEC advisor to lead policy communications
items.desc: KAST said Stephanie Allen will bolster KAST's public profile and reputation among policymakers, thought leaders, and media.

items.title: Ark Invest buys $39 million worth of Robinhood shares, offloads $6 million of its own spot bitcoin ETF
items.desc: Robinhood's stock closed down 13.2% after the company reported weaker first-quarter earnings the previous day.

items.title: XRP hits FOMO zone as Rakuten Pay partnership drives social chatter to greed levels
items.desc: XRP's positive-to-negative sentiment ratio on social media spiked into the FOMO zone on April 29, the same level that has historically marked local tops in the token, per Santiment data.

items.title: Twenty One Capital shares rise as Tether pushes merger with Strike, Elektron
items.desc: Tether has proposed that Twenty One Capital, a NYSE-listed bitcoin treasury venture, merge with Strike and Elektron Energy.

items.title: Meta rolls out stablecoin payouts for creators in Philippines, Colombia
items.desc: The latest stablecoin move comes years after Meta first dipped its toes into stablecoins through Libra in 2019, before scrapping the plans in 2022 due to regulatory pushback.

items.title: US Senator Tillis to push Senate Banking vote on stalled crypto bill
items.desc: Republican Senator Thom Tillis says the Senate’s version of the CLARITY Act has “made a lot of progress,” and it was time for lawmakers to vote on advancing the bill.

items.title: Ouch. The U.S. 30-year Treasury yield just hit 5% and bitcoin may pay the price
items.desc: Hawkish dissent within the Federal Reserve, elevated oil prices and rising long-term inflation expectations are pushing bond yields higher.

items.title: South Korea’s Shinhan Card to test real-world stablecoin payments on Solana
items.desc: Shinhan Card has partnered with the Solana Foundation for a proof-of-concept project testing a real-world payment system using stablecoins.

items.title: Twenty One Capital rises on proposed merger with Strike and Elektron
items.desc: Tether proposed that Elektron founder and CEO Raphael Zagury serve as president of the proposed merged company, while Strike's Jack Mallers would also serve in an executive role.

items.title: US, UAE and China joint effort dismantles 9 crypto scam centers
items.desc: In another police action, European police arrested 10 people and took down three scam centers, estimated to have stolen over $58 million from victims around the world.

items.title: Strike CEO Jack Mallers Announces Lending Proof-of-Reserves, Volatility-Proof Loans, and Backs Tether Merger Plan
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Strike CEO Jack Mallers Announces Lending Proof-of-Reserves, Volatility-Proof Loans, and Backs Tether Merger Plan Strike CEO Jack Mallers announced a series of product updates and strategic moves at the Bitcoin 2026 Conference. This post Strike CEO Jack Mallers Announces Lending Proof-of-Reserves, Volatility-Proof Loans, and Backs Tether Merger Plan first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Bitcoin futures signal caution as long-to-short ratio signals positioning shift
items.desc: Bitcoin derivatives highlight traders’ nervous view as the Federal Reserve holds interest rates and BTC struggles to trade above its range highs. Are the bears back?

items.title: Strategy and Blockstream CEOs Paint Vision of Bitcoin’s Financial Future
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Strategy and Blockstream CEOs Paint Vision of Bitcoin’s Financial Future Strategy CEO Phong Le and Blockstream CEO Adam Back joined moderator Natalie Brunell on Wednesday to discuss Bitcoin treasury strategy, tokenization, digital credit, and Satoshi Nakamoto’s identity. This post Strategy and Blockstream CEOs Paint Vision of Bitcoin’s Financial Future first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Morgan Stanley Executive on Bitcoin: ‘We Are Still So Early on This Journey’
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Morgan Stanley Executive on Bitcoin: ‘We Are Still So Early on This Journey’ Amy Oldenburg, head of digital assets at Morgan Stanley, says client education — not product design — is the central challenge facing bitcoin adoption at the firm and across the industry. This post Morgan Stanley Executive on Bitcoin: ‘We Are Still So Early on This Journey’ first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Bitcoin, WikiLeaks, and a Film the Streamers Wouldn’t Touch: Jack Dorsey and Eugene Jarecki Make Their Case
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Bitcoin, WikiLeaks, and a Film the Streamers Wouldn’t Touch: Jack Dorsey and Eugene Jarecki Make Their Case Filmmaker Eugene Jarecki and Jack Dorsey are teaming up to bring a Julian Assange documentary to the public through a bitcoin-powered distribution model. This post Bitcoin, WikiLeaks, and a Film the Streamers Wouldn’t Touch: Jack Dorsey and Eugene Jarecki Make Their Case first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Bitcoin recovery stalls after Fed holds interest rates, citing ‘uncertainty’ in Middle East
items.desc: Bitcoin dropped under $75,000 after FOMC minutes showed the US Federal Reserve holding interest rates and expressing slight concerns over inflation and the war in Iran.

items.title: Jack Mallers' Twenty One Capital surges after majority holder Tether proposes 3-way merger
items.desc: Tether has moved to combine bitcoin treasury, mining, and financial services under one roof.

items.title: Grayscale’s Zcash Trust volume doubles as ZEC’s shielded supply hits record highs
items.desc: It will be worth watching whether ZCSH can sustain over $2 million in daily volume into the new month.

items.title: SWEAT protocol thwarts multi-million dollar exploit, restores user balances
items.desc: Blockaid estimates the attacker stole roughly 13.71 billion SWEAT, about 65% of the total supply, worth about $3.5 million at the time.

items.title: RealOpen and TRON verify $9.4M in USDT for crypto-enabled real estate purchases
items.desc: RealOpen, the leading platform for buying real estate with crypto, today announced the conclusion of its collaborative "Fast Moves, Fast Payments" Holiday Campaign with TRON

items.title: Key Senator Pushes for Vote on Clarity Act—But Hurdles Remain
items.desc: Thom Tillis, a swing GOP vote on the Senate Banking Committee, says his colleagues should take up a months-delayed vote on the crypto bill.

items.title: Bitcoin slips to $75,000 as Fed holds rates, dissenters chill Warsh ‘pivot party’
items.desc: A split 8-4 vote initially spooked markets, creating uncertainty around the Federal Reserve's future policy moves.

items.title: Meta Launches USDC Stablecoin Creator Payouts on Solana and Polygon via Stripe
items.desc: Facebook and Instagram parent company Meta is now offering stablecoin payouts to content creators in certain countries.

items.title: Stable Sea integrates WisdomTree tokenized Treasury fund for cash management
items.desc: Businesses can now allocate idle cash to a government-backed fund via Stable Sea, as tokenized Treasury products gain traction in corporate finance.

items.title: Celsius Founder Alex Mashinsky Banned From Crypto Industry in $10 Million FTC Settlement
items.desc: The settlement represents a massive reduction from an initial $4.7 billion judgment against the Celsius founder.

items.title: Bitcoin Dips Under $76K as Fed Holds Rates in Rare 8-4 Split
items.desc: ETH is down 7% on the week as the Fed signals the bar for rate cuts has risen, and ETF outflows top $350 million over two days.

items.title: Meta begins offering USDC creator payouts to crypto wallets on Solana and Polygon blockchains
items.desc: The social media giant suggests a host of popular wallets creators can use including MetaMask, Phantom, and Binance.

items.title: Fed chair Jerome Powell says he will stay on as Govenor after term amid legal pressure
items.desc: During a press conference following the Fed's interest rate decision, Powell said ongoing scrutiny and political tension forced him to stay, despite his plans to step down.

items.title: Meta Launches Stablecoin Payouts In Colombia And The Philippines
items.desc: The social media giant has rolled out USDC payments via Stripe on Solana and Polygon.

items.title: Tech giant Meta starts paying some creators in stablecoin with Stripe's support
items.desc: The tech giant is first offering the feature to select creators in Colombia and the Philippines.

items.title: Bitcoin-Backed Loans Are Unlocking Homeownership for an Entire New Generation
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Bitcoin-Backed Loans Are Unlocking Homeownership for an Entire New Generation At the Bitcoin 2026 Conference, executives from SALT Lending and Peoples Reserve argued that Bitcoin-backed loans are emerging as a viable path to homeownership by letting holders leverage Bitcoin as collateral instead of selling it. This post Bitcoin-Backed Loans Are Unlocking Homeownership for an Entire New Generation first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Steak ‘n Shake Says Bitcoin Payments Cut Processing Costs by 50%, Save $6 Million Annually
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Steak ‘n Shake Says Bitcoin Payments Cut Processing Costs by 50%, Save $6 Million Annually Steak ‘n Shake exec Michael Boes told Bitcoin 2026 attendees that Bitcoin has become central to the chain’s turnaround, driving 2 million new customers, cutting costs, and helping fund a healthier menu overhaul. This post Steak ‘n Shake Says Bitcoin Payments Cut Processing Costs by 50%, Save $6 Million Annually first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Kustodia launches smart contract escrow for LATAM's $600m fraud crisis
items.desc: Mexico's first peso-denominated blockchain escrow goes live on SPEI for high-value P2P transactions.

items.title: Bitcoin falls as traders cut risk ahead of FOMC: Will TradFi, spot ETF volumes bolster $70K support?
items.desc: Bitcoin price volatility tends to spike before and after the FOMC, a pattern that is playing out this week. Will institutional investor BTC buying protect the $70,000 support?

items.title: Polymarket Hit $25.7B in March Volume as Retail Traders Bet on Sports, Politics and Crypto
items.desc: A study of 1.29M wallets shows users returning more often and trading across more categories, with sports leading at $10.1B and crypto serving as the main onboarding gateway.

items.title: KuCoin EU hires new AML chief after Austria ban on new business under MiCA
items.desc: KuCoin EU hires a new AML chief and deputies in Vienna weeks after Austria’s regulator banned the MiCA‑licensed exchange from taking on new business over compliance gaps.

items.title: JPMorgan hires former Goldman Sachs exec for Kinexys. Here is why he believes tokenization is only half the battle
items.desc: JPMorgan’s new crypto head Oliver Harris has previously warned that tokenizing assets isn't a magic fix for liquidity, but believes the technology is finally ready to "rip out" and replace the financial industry's legacy back end.

items.title: The ‘tokenization of everything’ is no longer a theory
items.desc: Wall Street is moving in. Washington has changed sides. And Consensus 2026 is where crypto’s biggest inflection point gets decided.

items.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Dip as Fed Holds Rates Steady for Third Straight Time
items.desc: Wednesday's FOMC meeting was expected to be Jerome Powell’s last as Federal Reserve chair.

items.title: U.S. senator holding cards on Clarity Act's next move says it's ready to get to hearing
items.desc: Senator Thom Tillis was at the center of the legislative negotiations over stablecoin yield that have delayed the market structure bill, but he said it's time to go.

items.title: MoonPay Folds Sodot Into New Institutional Platform
items.desc: Former acting CFTC Chairman Caroline Pham will run the new business, which bundles key management, custody, execution, and white-label stablecoin issuance into a single stack.

items.title: US Judge Bans Celsius Founder Mashinsky From Any Product Involving 'Assets'
items.desc: The Federal Trade Commission settlement decision also ordered Mashinsky to pay the commission $10 million.

items.title: Tether Stakeholder Gave Farage Undisclosed $6.7M Gift Amid Reform UK Crypto Funding Scrutiny
items.desc: The personal gift to the Reform UK leader from billionaire Christopher Harborne comes amid scrutiny over crypto industry political funding.

items.title: Stable Sea Taps WisdomTree to Bring Tokenized Treasury Yield to Business Operating Cash
items.desc: The collaboration lets non-crypto-native finance teams sweep idle dollars into WisdomTree's WTGXX alongside their stablecoin payments, with daily dividend accrual and 24/7 liquidity.

items.title: Securitize Teams Up With Computershare to Tokenize U.S.-Listed Equities
items.desc: Issuer-Sponsored Tokens enable direct equity ownership in token form, rather than synthetic wrappers sitting on top of underlying shares.

items.title: Pumpfun Announces 50% Revenue Buyback-and-Burn Model
items.desc: PUMP briefly rallied today on news that the platform has burned ~36% of the token's circulating supply from previous buybacks.

items.title: Standard Chartered Calls Kelp Aftermath DeFi's 'Antifragile Moment'
items.desc: The bank's digital assets team argues the post-Kelp coalition response and structural fixes around bridges leave DeFi stronger, not weaker, ahead of the Ethereum Economic Zone going live this summer.

items.title: Canadian Government Pushes for Sweeping Ban on Bitcoin, Crypto ATMs
items.desc: The country hosts nearly 4,000 crypto ATMs, second only to the U.S.

items.title: MoonPay Launches Institutional Division, Acquires Crypto Key Management Firm Sodot
items.desc: Crypto payments processor MoonPay is expanding into institutional services with a veteran regulator at the helm.

items.title: Polymarket Eyes US Return for Crypto Exchange as Lone CFTC Chair Weighs Approval​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
items.desc: With four of five CFTC commissioner seats vacant, the decision on whether to lift Polymarket's U.S. ban rests with Chair Michael Selig alone.

items.title: Visa Adds Base, Polygon, Canton, Arc and Tempo to Stablecoin Settlement Program
items.desc: Payments giant Visa scales its blockchain settlement infrastructure with five new networks as pilot program shows 50% quarterly growth.

items.title: Bitcoin's Upside Capped by $82K Sell Wall as UAE’s OPEC Exit Triggers Risk Sell-Off
items.desc: Multiple $3.3 million sell walls sit between $80,400 and $82,000 as oil volatility and rising real rates keep Bitcoin trapped.

items.title: Bullish Invests 250 BTC in BTCFi Company Mezo
items.desc: The investment, worth over $19M at current prices, coincides with Mezo's launch of Bitcoin yield vaults for institutional clients.

items.title: Morning Minute: Paul Tudor Jones Calls Bitcoin Strongest Inflation Hedge
items.desc: Crypto majors rebound ahead of FOMC, despite oil surging, while Polymarket is making a push to enter the U.S.

items.title: Ethereum ICO Whale Who Turned $3,100 Into $23M Wakes Up After a Decade
items.desc: A wallet dormant since 2015 just moved 10,000 ETH—but analysts say a custody restructuring, not a sell, is the likely explanation.

items.title: Judge Shoots Down Sam Bankman-Fried's Bid for New Trial
items.desc: The judge dismissed the FTX founder’s claims that potential witnesses faced "government threats and retaliation" as "wildly conspiratorial.”

items.title: Bitcoin is Reshaping Traditional Finance, Industry Leaders Say
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine Bitcoin is Reshaping Traditional Finance, Industry Leaders Say At Bitcoin 2026, a Nakamoto Stage panel made a simple but striking point: Bitcoin’s institutional growth is being driven by competitors who are actually working together, building the tools, products, and infrastructure needed to bring the asset into mainstream finance. This post Bitcoin is Reshaping Traditional Finance, Industry Leaders Say first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: ‘This Time Is Different’: A First of Its Kind Documentary Covering Bitcoin’s Four Year Cycle, David Bailey, And Nakamoto in Production
items.desc: Bitcoin Magazine ‘This Time Is Different’: A First of Its Kind Documentary Covering Bitcoin’s Four Year Cycle, David Bailey, And Nakamoto in Production A new documentary, This Time Is Different, will chronicle Bitcoin’s four-year cycle and David Bailey’s journey building Nakamoto Inc. through its public launch and market swings. This post ‘This Time Is Different’: A First of Its Kind Documentary Covering Bitcoin’s Four Year Cycle, David Bailey, And Nakamoto in Production first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

items.title: Woman Gets 71 Months in Prison Over Bitcoin Investment Fraud Targeting Elderly Victims
items.desc: Federal prosecutors secured a prison term for a Saipan woman who defrauded elderly victims through a fake Bitcoin investment scheme

items.title: CFTC Backs Prediction Markets in Yet Another Lawsuit Against a State
items.desc: CFTC Chair Mike Selig has vowed to sue any state that attempts to regulate prediction markets under its own gambling laws.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds $76K Ahead of Powell's Final Fed Meeting
items.desc: Crypto markets are trading cautiously, with the Fed widely expected to hold rates steady tomorrow.

items.title: DeFi United Outlines Technical Path To Make Kelp's rsETH Whole
items.desc: The coalition has secured ETH commitments to refill the bridge in tranches and will use Aave and Compound governance proposals to liquidate the exploiter's remaining positions.

items.title: Soldier Charged in Polymarket Insider Trading Case Pleads Not Guilty
items.desc: Special forces member Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly used inside knowledge of a Venezuelan military operation to make nearly $400K profit on Polymarket.

items.title: Ostium Launches Institutional Hedging Layer
items.desc: The Arbitrum-based RWA perps protocol now routes net directional flow to Jump and prime brokers offchain, retiring the single-pool model that absorbed all trader risk.

items.title: CFTC Sues Wisconsin in Response to State's Lawsuits Against Prediction Markets
items.desc: The CFTC filed suit against Wisconsin to establish its exclusive regulatory authority over prediction markets, a sector closely tied to crypto and blockchain-based derivatives.

items.title: Polymarket Seeks Full CFTC Approval for Its Main Platform: Report
items.desc: The move would let Polymarket's primary, on-chain prediction market platform operate in the United States, rather than through its current intermediated setup with Polymarket US.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.

items.title: Bitcoin Core 31.0 released
items.desc: Bitcoin Core version 31.0 is now available for download. See the release notes for more information about the bug fixes in this release. If you have any questions, please stop by the #bitcoin IRC chatroom (IRC, web) and we’ll do our best to help you.
